title: (Bee's) Fancy Crops
description: My take on prettier farming, compatible with mods
body: ‏‏‎ ### About 🌾 This little resource pack reworks the vanilla crop model and adds variations to crop textures! It also retextures seeds and the hay bale block. It was built to work with **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)**. The fluffy crop model should be compatible with all mods that add crops. Feel free to look at the gallery for pictures. I hope it makes your farming experience feel a tiny bit more alive! ### Compatibility You might get an in-game "made for a newer version of Minecraft" warning if you're not playing on the latest version. You can freely ignore it if you're playing on a version the resource pack file is tagged with. Does not require any mods to work. ### Collections Here are my other packs that go well with this one! - [My **Vanilla+ Collections**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) ∗ a pack of extensive texture improvements, from grass to resources - [**Fine Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fine-armoury) ∗ many retextures of tools, weapons, and armour - [**Serified Font**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/serified-font) ∗ my take on a much fancier font - [**Fluffy Carpets and Wool**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fluffy-carpets) ∗ my take on much fluffier wool and carpets (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Cosier Beds**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozier-beds) ∗ my take on prettier and cosier bed models (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Banner Pattern Clarity**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity) ∗ provides distinctive (and pretty) banner pattern item textures - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
